# FallRisks — Home Safety Assessment for Older Adults

> Free 6-room home safety walkthrough for older adults and families. Identifies fall hazards in bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, stairs, living room, and outdoor spaces.

## What we do
FallRisks provides proactive fall prevention through a room-by-room home safety assessment. 36 million falls occur every year in the US — falls are the #1 cause of injury death in adults 65+. Most happen at home. Our assessment takes under 5 minutes and produces a prioritized hazard report with actionable fixes.

## Key statistics
- 36 million falls per year (CDC)
- #1 cause of injury death in adults 65+ (CDC WISQARS)
- 6 rooms covered: bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, stairs, living room, outdoor

## Connected ecosystem
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care — worker-owned companion caregivers for in-home support
- HealthGait: https://healthgait.com — gait analysis and balance assessment
- Altru.care: https://altru.care — physician services and Letters of Medical Necessity
- ComfortCard: https://comfortcard.org — HSA/FSA health identity and spending
- CareGoals: https://caregoals.com — advance care planning
- SolvingHealth: https://solvinghealth.com — the underlying platform

## Links
- Website: https://fallrisks.com
- Assessment: https://fallrisks.com/safety-assessment.html
- MCP endpoint: solvinghealth-mcp-production.up.railway.app/mcp
